titleStmt.title: SII 23.46: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 46. (A.R. No. 46 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the same wall Rājēndra-Chōḷa I: year 3: 1014-15 A.D.

summary.p: This is a damaged and incomplete record. It registers the gift of a gold necklace containing the tāli (auspicious ornament) set with precious stones and other parts (for the image of the goddess), to the temple of god Tiruviśalūr-Mahādēva, by Atiyirāmaṉ Kundappāvaiyār the queen of Pāṇḍya Śrīvalluvar (Śrīvallabha) and daughter of a chief of Paṅgaḷa-nāḍu (name not given). Mention is also made of a certain Sundaraśōḻaṉ (as donor) along with the queen. The gift by a Pāṇḍya queen to a temple in the Chōḷa territory at this period is noteworthy, as indicating friendly relations between the two kings. Śrīvallabha must have been occupying quite a subordinate position under the Chōḷa since the latter's father Rājarāja I is known (from the Tiruvālaṅgāḍu Plates) to have seized the Pāṇḍya king Amarabhujaṅga, and Rājēndra himself set up his son under the title Chōḷa-Pāṇḍya as his viceroy in the Pāṇḍya country.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastīśrī . kopparakeśaripanmarāṉa śrīirājentriracoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 3Āvatu vaṭakarai Irājentrasi havaḷanāṭ
ṭu maṇṇināṭṭu brahmadeyam vempaṟṟūrākiya coḻamāttāṇṭa catu rvetimaṅkalattu tiruvicalūrmahāte
varkku pāṇṭiyaṉ śrīvalluvar teviyār paṅkaḷanāṭuṭaiyār maka(ḷ)ḷār Atiyirāmaṉ kuntappāvaiyār varakkāṭṭiṉa
tirumālaiyil tāli 4 10 1 nāṟppattoṉṟum kaṭaippalakai Iraṇṭum paṭu kaṇ 2- ṇṭum Āṇi 2- ṇṭu
m taṭavikkaṭṭiṉa kallu 4 10 2 nāṟppattiraṇṭum palakai 3 10 9 muppat tonpatum muttu 5 10 2 Aimpattiraṇṭum
Arakku nūlum Uḷpaṭa devar paṇṭārakkallāl niṟai pon 3 10 �ndha muppatiṉ kaḻañcey mukkā
le nālumañcāṭiyum Eḻumāvum Iva(r)re varakkāṭṭina mañcirāk kal niṟai 3 10 5 samuppat
taiyṅ kaḻañceymukkālum cun=tiracoḻaṉ va mukkaḻañce mukkā
le Iraṇṭu mañcāṭiyum Iraṇṭu māvum I(ā)vare varakkāṭṭiṉa muttu vāḷi Itil muttuIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 23.46 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
